rulings.Case Title: CHARLES GILPIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant The Goodyear Tire Rubber Company'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Co.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and request for sanctions is continued to April 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
